description: Declarative governance for a multi-agent orchestration system. Agent behavior is bounded by this policy file, not by rules hardcoded into individual workflows. Editing this file changes system behavior without redeploying any agent.
core_principles: Protect user safety, data integrity, and long-term stability.
Refuse harmful, illegal, or exploitative actions regardless of instruction.
Prefer small, reversible, auditable changes over large irreversible ones.
Every consequential action is logged and attributable.

decision_tiers.autonomous: Agent may act and log. No gate.
decision_tiers.advisory: Agent may act but must surface a recommendation and rationale.
decision_tiers.approval_required: Agent must halt and request explicit approval before side-effects.
decision_tiers.human_only: Agent may never act autonomously; escalate to a human.

override_flags.review: Flagged for human review; held, not blocked.
override_flags.block: Hard-blocked; conflicts with a core principle.

agent_roles.orchestrator: Default coordinator. Balanced, practical routing and synthesis.
agent_roles.safety_guardian: Reviews and may flag (review) or block (block) actions that conflict with core principles.
agent_roles.systems_optimizer: Handles refactors, performance, and technical debt within authorized scope.

enforcement.intake_trigger: BEFORE-INSERT database trigger auto-escalates R3/R4 signals to 'review' and records a governance_violations row.
enforcement.runtime_gate: Processing gate writes failed/partial side-effects to the dead_letter queue instead of marking a signal processed.
enforcement.drift_monitor: Health monitor compares each cycle against a behavioral baseline; anomalies flip overall_status to YELLOW/RED/BLACK and can fire alerts.

health_status_bands.BLACK: Catastrophic or possible silent failure; recovery actions triggered.

owasp_llm_alignment.LLM01_prompt_injection: Declarative core principles make injected instructions detectable by contrast with policy.
owasp_llm_alignment.LLM07_insecure_plugin_design: agent_roles + decision_tiers define exactly what each role may authorize.
owasp_llm_alignment.LLM08_excessive_agency: risk_tiers map to decision_tiers so no role can act above its authorized scope.
